member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Helpers.ColorHelper
member.summary: Conversion helpers between Windows console color attributes and WPF .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Helpers.ColorHelper.IsValidConsoleColor(System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Checks whether the specified color is representable in the standard Windows console palette (channels limited to 0/128/255).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ConsoleHelper
member.summary: Helpers for allocating and configuring a Windows console that backs .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ConsoleHelper.Allocate
member.summary: Allocates a console for the current process if one doesn't exist, and hides its window. This is required to work with console screen buffers.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ConsoleHelper.SetEncoding
member.summary: Sets console input and output code pages to UTF-8.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper
member.summary: Converts WPF keyboard input into VT/ANSI-compatible sequences (VT200 for special keys) or printable text.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper.ConvertToVT(System.Windows.Input.KeyEventArgs)
member.summary: Converts a WPF key event into a VT/ANSI string (when possible).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper.ConvertToVT(System.Windows.Input.Key)
member.summary: Converts a WPF into a VT200 control sequence (for special keys) or a printable character.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper.GetVT200Code(System.Windows.Input.Key)
member.summary: Returns a VT200 escape sequence for special keys (arrows, function keys, etc.), or null if not mapped.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper.GetCharFromKey(System.Windows.Input.Key)
member.summary: Attempts to translate a WPF into a Unicode character using Windows keyboard state APIs.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.KeyHelper.IsModifier(System.Windows.Input.Key)
member.summary: Returns true if the key is a modifier (Shift/Ctrl/Alt).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventHandler
member.summary: Routed event handler for . Raised when the user submits a command (Enter key or clicking the submit button).
member.param: The object that raised the event.
Event data containing the submitted command.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventHandler
member.summary: Routed event handler for . Raised when a raw key sequence is forwarded to the attached terminal session.
member.param: The object that raised the event.
Event data containing the raw key bytes.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing the submitted command text.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs.#ctor(System.Windows.RoutedEvent,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing the submitted command text.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.CommandSubmittedEventArgs.CommandText
member.summary: Gets the submitted command text.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing raw key bytes sent to the session.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs.#ctor(System.Windows.RoutedEvent,System.Object,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Routed event arguments for , containing raw key bytes sent to the session.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.KeyPressedEventArgs.KeyData
member.summary: Gets the raw key data that was sent to the terminal session.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox
member.summary: A small command entry control (prompt + input + submit button) that can optionally send submitted commands into an attached .
PromptBox

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.Session
member.summary: Gets or sets the target . If set, submitted commands and special keys are sent to the session.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InputText
member.summary: Gets or sets the current input text.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.IsInputEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the input box is enabled.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.Prompt
member.summary: Gets or sets the prompt label text displayed before the input box (for example, > ).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.KeyPressed
member.summary: Occurs when a special key (VT sequence) is pressed and forwarded. Routed event (bubbling).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.CommandSubmitted
member.summary: Occurs when the user submits a command (Enter or submit button). Routed event (bubbling).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.SessionProperty
member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InputTextProperty
member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.IsInputEnabledProperty
member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.PromptProperty
member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.CommandSubmittedEvent
member.summary: Identifies the routed event.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.KeyPressedEvent
member.summary: Identifies the routed event.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.PromptBox.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache
member.summary: Resolves instances for the primary font and fallback families, maps codepoints to glyph indices (with fallback), and exposes font metrics for grid layout. Glyph lookups are cached per codepoint.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.Configure(System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Rebuilds the cache for the given primary family, size, line-height, and fallbacks.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.GetGlyph(System.Text.Rune)
member.summary: Resolves the (typeface, glyph) for a codepoint, trying fallbacks when absent.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.GlyphCache.GetVariant(System.Windows.FontWeight,System.Windows.FontStyle)
member.summary: Weight/style variant of the primary typeface for bold/italic runs.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection
member.summary: A rectangular text selection in buffer coordinates (start/end inclusive, normalized so Start ≤ End). Used by to highlight selected cells.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer
member.summary: Paints terminal rows using : coalesces same-style cells into runs, resolves default/inverse/conceal colors, draws backgrounds, underlines, strikethrough, overline, and the cursor. Positioning is column-based (monospace advance assumption).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.RenderCursor(System.Windows.Media.DrawingContext,System.Int32,VirtualTerminal.Buffer.CursorShape)
member.summary: Renders the cursor shape at column (row-local y=0).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalRenderer.RenderRow(System.Windows.Media.DrawingContext,System.Span{VirtualTerminal.Model.TerminalCellInfo},System.Nullable{VirtualTerminal.Rendering.TerminalSelection},System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Renders a single row into (local origin = row top-left).

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl
member.summary: WPF control that renders a using a fixed-size terminal grid (size is derived from the control bounds). Scrolling is performed against the scrollback buffer, not by scrolling a huge child element.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Session
member.summary: Gets or sets the active displayed by this control.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorBlinking
member.summary: Gets or sets whether cursor blinking should be enabled.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.AllowDirectInput
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this control should forward keyboard input directly into the session.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollDownVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the floating "scroll to bottom" button is enabled.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScreenBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the terminal background color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScreenForeground
member.summary: Gets or sets the terminal foreground color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cursor is visible.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the cursor color.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.CursorShape
member.summary: Gets or sets the shape of the cursor.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollbackLines
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of scrollback lines retained.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.LineHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the line height multiplier (1.0 = default).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.OutputText
member.summary: Gets the rendered output as text (reserved for higher-level usages).

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.AutoScrolling
member.summary: Gets whether the viewport is pinned to the live bottom.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Encoding
member.summary: Gets the encoding used by the underlying session.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the control.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollBy(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scrolls the viewport by (positive = up into history).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.ScrollToBottom
member.summary: Snaps the viewport back to the live bottom of the buffer.

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.TitleChanged
member.summary: Raised when the connected program changes the title (OSC 0/1/2).

member.name: E:VirtualTerminal.TerminalControl.Bell
member.summary: Raised on BEL.
